3-Step Process

How It Works

1

Apply in 3 Minutes

Complete our quick online form with no credit check and no obligation. Tell us your budget and vehicle preference.

2

Get Matched & Called

A specialist calls you within 24 hours with vehicle options you're already pre-approved for — no surprises, no pressure.

3

Drive Home Today

Choose your vehicle and we deliver it free anywhere in BC — with a full tank of gas ready to go.

Specialists handle a limited number of files daily to guarantee personal attention for every customer.

Mainland Automotive — Leads

Loading…

Integration Setup Guide

Enable any or all three channels by editing the LEAD_CONFIG object in this file's <script> section.

📧 Step 1 — EmailJS (sends leads to bcapprovedautoloans@gmail.com)
  1. Go to emailjs.com → Sign up free
  2. Click Email Services → Add New Service → choose Gmail → connect bcapprovedautoloans@gmail.com
  3. Click Email Templates → Create New Template
    Set To Email = {{to_email}}  |  Subject = {{subject}}
    Body can use: {{lead_type}} {{name}} {{email}} {{phone}} {{vehicle}} {{budget}} {{city}} {{date}}
  4. Go to Account → API Keys → copy your Public Key
  5. In this HTML file, find LEAD_CONFIG and set:
    enabled: true
    publicKey: 'your_public_key'
    serviceId: 'your_service_id'
    templateId: 'your_template_id'
📊 Step 2 — Google Sheets (auto-log every lead)
  1. Create a new Google Sheet — name it Mainland Leads
  2. Row 1 headers: Date | Type | First Name | Last Name | Email | Phone | City | Vehicle | Budget | Employment | Prize/Income
  3. Click Extensions → Apps Script → replace all code with:
    function doPost(e) {
  var sheet = SpreadsheetApp.getActiveSpreadsheet().getActiveSheet();
  var data  = JSON.parse(e.postData.contents);
  sheet.appendRow([
    data.date, data.type, data.firstName, data.lastName,
    data.email, data.phone, data.city, data.vehicleType,
    data.budget, data.employment, data.income
  ]);
  return ContentService.createTextOutput('OK');
}
  4. Click Deploy → New Deployment → Web App
    Execute as: Me | Who has access: Anyone → Deploy → copy the URL
  5. In LEAD_CONFIG set googleSheets.enabled: true and paste the URL into webhookUrl
🔗 Step 3 — Webhook (Make / Zapier / n8n)
  1. Make (Integromat): New scenario → Webhooks → Custom webhook → Copy URL
  2. Zapier: New Zap → Trigger: Webhooks by Zapier → Catch Hook → Copy URL
  3. n8n: New workflow → Webhook node → Copy production URL
  4. Paste the URL into LEAD_CONFIG.webhook.url and set enabled: true
  5. The payload sent is JSON with fields: event, source, type, name, email, phone, vehicle, budget, employment, income, city, date, timestamp
